title: Sis Hopkins
writer: Jack Townley, Milt Gross, Edward Eliscu
actors: Judy Canova, Bob Crosby, Charles Butterworth
plot: A young girl from the "sticks" comes to the city to live with her wealthy relatives. At first she is the objection of derision and made fun of because of her unsophisticated nature, but it turns out that there's a bit more to her ...
